# Apr 12 2003 at 1:22 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593966360168
View User Forum
1 post
These seemingly useless bracers are used in the Goblin Battlemasters quest. This is a low end quest offered in the FV Ranger guild. The reward is a random piece from the set of Faydark Ringmail; Low ac, + Cha.

Hope this is some help

Mich
51st Season Ranger
Terris-Thule

Pharse
35th Season Wizard
Firiona Vie

# Feb 21 2003 at 7:53 PM Rating: Default

4 posts
I looted two of these in about 5 minutes.. and destroyed them as they appear to be useless... are these in ANYWAY useful?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 03 2002 at 3:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Some of these posts are so ignorant.....
RE: jeez
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 9:56 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758900088
Scholar
63 posts
A bit simplistic (and abrasive).

Strength makes you stronger, and increases your attack rating.

Agility increases defense (although not, I believe, while stunned).

Charisma, up to a point, and combined with faction, determines prices you get when buying/selling with vendors.

It is also a check when charming and mezing, and a check to see if a mob, on a failed mez, (as well as surrounding mobs) will aggro you, after the failure.
▲ Page top
quest

Quest Item
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2001 at 4:28 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247429711
Scholar
70 posts
Give these to the ranger trainer (Captain Keater?) in Firiona Vie, must have amiable faction to complete. You will recieve a random piece of Faydark Ringmail. Each piece has i believe the same AC as regular ringmail and also a small amount of +CHA. I use the helm and sleeves (only pieces i have) whenever i buy/sell.
▲ Page top
RE: Quest Item
QuoteReply

4 posts

RE: Quest Item

# Apr 05 2002 at 6:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777561048
36 posts
when turning the bracers in you must give Cpt. Kaetar four at a time. if you dont you have just wasted your time.

#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 04 2001 at 6:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) These suck fat donkey rod and are not worth anything. It is kinda funny tha the murchants offer me money for them but will not actually do a transaction. My advice...If you get them you should just destroy them just pay for a set of bronze it is much better. Actually they are best for Sk because of the charisma hit which is good for the fears but otherwise sucks.
